mechanism: Inhibits FLT3 and multiple kinases to suppress FLT3-ITD AML cell proliferation
additional_notes: Approved for RCC/HCC/THC; frequently used as a chemical FLT3 inhibitor benchmark in MOLM13 and MV4-11

mechanism: Inhibits FLT3 among other kinases to reduce proliferation in FLT3-ITD AML lines
Potently inhibits FLT3, including resistance mutations, leading to strong activity in FLT3-ITD AML
Inhibits FLT3, including certain TKD mutants, to inhibit FLT3-ITD AML cell growth
Inhibits FLT3, including D835/TKD mutants, active in FLT3-driven AML lines
Broad kinase inhibition including FLT3 activity; shows preclinical efficacy in FLT3-ITD AML models

category: SRC/ABL family tyrosine kinase inhibitor (with FLT3 activity)
mechanism: Inhibits SRC/ABL and has reported FLT3 activity; antiproliferative in some FLT3-ITD AML lines
Inhibits 26S proteasome, inducing apoptosis in AML cells including FLT3-ITD backgrounds
Irreversible proteasome inhibition leading to AML cytotoxicity; can synergize with FLT3 inhibitors
Histone deacetylase inhibition leading to transcriptional reprogramming and AML cell death
additional_notes: Also known as SAHA; approved for CTCL

mechanism: Broad HDAC inhibition producing antiproliferative effects in AML and synergy with TKIs
Blocks MEK1/2 in the MAPK pathway to suppress AML cell growth; often synergizes with FLT3 inhibitors
additional_notes: Approved for melanoma and other indications

mechanism: Inhibits MEK in the MAPK pathway; shows preclinical AML activity and synergy with FLT3 blockade
Inhibits mTORC1 signaling to reduce AML cell viability
additional_notes: Approved for various cancers and TSC

mechanism: Inhibits mTOR signaling to block AML growth, with reported combination activity with TKIs
Blocks exportin-1 (XPO1)–mediated nuclear export, inducing apoptosis in AML cells
Inhibits SYK signaling relevant to AML survival pathways
Inhibits Smoothened (SMO) to block Hedgehog signaling and suppress AML cell growth
additional_notes: Approved for BCC; glasdegib (related SMO inhibitor) is AML-approved, supporting pathway relevance

mechanism: Inhibits mitochondrial translation, selectively impairing AML blasts/LSCs
additional_notes: Preclinical activity in vitro and ex vivo, including FLT3-ITD AML lines such as MOLM13

mechanism: Inhibits thioredoxin reductase, promoting ROS-mediated AML cell death
additional_notes: Approved for rheumatoid arthritis; active in FLT3-ITD AML backgrounds
